zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Bonville於1324年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特易亞斯特 哈普崔時，她的父親Bonville25歲，母親Bonville20歲。她於1345年與Richard Newton Chedder在英國薩默塞特修頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1426年3月27日享年102歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Bonville was born in 1324, in East Harptree, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Bonville, was 25 and her mother, Bonville, was 20. She married Richard Newton Chedder in 1345, in Chewton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 March 1426, at the age of 102.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Bonville est née en 1324, à East Harptree, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bonville, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Bonville, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Newton Chedder en 1345, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1426, à l’âge de 102 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bonvilleが1324年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトエアスト ハープトレで生まれた時，父Bonvilleは25歳，母Bonvilleは20歳であった。1345年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンでRichard Newton Chedderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1426年3月27日に102歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Bonville(이)가 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 이스트 하르프트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bonville(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bonville(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 Richard Newton Chedder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1426년 3월 27일 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Bonville родилась в 1324 г. в местности эаст харптри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bonville было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Bonville, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Newton Chedder в 1345 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 марта 1426 г. в возрасте 102 лет.
